params.name: Time-Travel Box
params.source: Dragon Chest (5%), Fragment Crafting (4.6%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.17%)
params.description:
On Jul 27, 2001, someone opened Time Travel Box again and traveled back to the past. 

On that day, the guy chanted the mantra while opening the box under the moonlight. In a whoosh, he traveled through time, changed into a handsome general who was commanding an elite army on a chariot to pursue a fleeing adversary. It was all dark at night and not long he found he was in front of one tree with bark removed. The curious general ordered his soldier to get a torch to check the tree and find...
